text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With the protection of the deities of<n>the north,
Matikanefukukitaru makes<n>her mark on the
Sapporo Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, we go out on a fun<n>sightseeing tour of
Sapporo.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
When we pass by the Sapporo Clock<n>Tower,
Matikanefukukitaru notices<n>that the needle is
pointing south<n>towards the Nakayama Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Believing this to be a sign from<n>above, she
chooses to run in the<n>Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She stokes her passion, determined<n>to earn her
spot on her own merits,<n>unlike what happened
with the<n>Takarazuka Kinen.
